Usage: tmplt config [command]

Tmplt.Cli

  new       Create a template based off of a directory's structure.
  delete    Delete a template.
  list      List all templates.

result.stdout:
Usage: tmplt config new [--description <String>] [--tags <String>] [--help] name root

Create a template based off of a directory's structure.

Arguments:
  0: name    The name of the template (Required)
  1: root    The root path used to begin configuring the template. (Required)

Options:
  -d, --description <String>    The description of the template.
  -t, --tags <String>           A comma-separated list of tags for the template.
  -h, --help                    Show help message

  1: root    The root path used to begin configuring the template. (Required)

  -h, --help                    Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: tmplt create [--help] name root

Create a project from a template.

Arguments:
  0: name    The name of the template (Required)
  1: root    The root path used to begin creating on. NOTE: It will copy the exact structure into root, overriding any existing files. (Required)

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message
